positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page with their account information displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify that the user is redirected away from the login page
Verify that the dashboard or home page is displayed
Verify that the logged-in user's name or email 'testd1051@gmail.com' is visible in the header or profile section
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid credentials

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged out, session is terminated, and the login page is displayed. Protected routes are no longer accessible.
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Locate and click the 'Logout' or 'Sign Out' button (e.g., in the navigation menu or profile dropdown)
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page
Verify a logout confirmation message is displayed (if applicable)
Verify that accessing a protected route now redirects back to the login page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout after login

positive_scenarios.expected_result: All expected UI elements on the login page are rendered correctly and are interactive
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page title or heading is displayed (e.g., 'Login', 'Sign In')
Verify the email/username input field is present and enabled
Verify the password input field is present and enabled
Verify the password field masks entered characters
Verify the 'Login' / 'Submit' button is present and enabled
Verify any 'Forgot Password' or 'Remember Me' links/checkboxes are visible (if applicable)
positive_scenarios.title: Login page renders all required UI elements correctly

positive_scenarios.expected_result: The authenticated session persists after a page refresh and the user remains on the protected page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Refresh the browser page (F5 or browser refresh button)
Verify the user is still logged in and the dashboard/home page remains displayed
Verify the user is NOT redirected back to the login page after refresh
positive_scenarios.title: Session persistence — user remains logged in on page refresh

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated regardless of the email case, confirming the system handles email case-insensitivity correctly
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'TESTD1051@GMAIL.COM' (uppercase version of the valid email) in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard/home page
positive_scenarios.title: Login with email containing uppercase characters (case-insensitivity check)

positive_scenarios.expected_result: After successful login, the user is redirected to the protected page they originally attempted to access
steps: Open the browser and directly navigate to a known protected URL within the application (e.g., https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/dashboard)
Verify the user is redirected to the login page at https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the originally requested protected page (e.g., /dashboard) and not just the default home page
positive_scenarios.title: Redirect to originally requested protected page after successful login

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Form submission is blocked and validation error messages are displayed for both empty email and password fields
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the email/username field empty
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify appropriate validation error messages are displayed (e.g., 'Email is required', 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty email and empty password fields

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login fails and a relevant error message is displayed. The user remains on the login page.
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter an incorrect password (e.g., 'WrongPassword123!') in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify an error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials', 'Incorrect password', or 'Email or password is incorrect')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid email but incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Form submission is blocked or login fails with a validation error message indicating an invalid email format
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter an invalid email format 'testd1051gmail.com' (missing @) in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify a validation error message is displayed (e.g., 'Please enter a valid email address')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid email format

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Form submission is blocked and a password required validation error message is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Leave the password field completely empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify a validation error message is displayed for the password field (e.g., 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty password field only

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login fails with a generic error message that does not reveal whether the email account exists in the system
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a non-existent email 'nonexistentuser9999@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter any password (e.g., 'SomePassword123!') in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify an error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials' or 'No account found with this email')
Verify that the error message does NOT specifically confirm whether the email exists (to prevent user enumeration)
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with unregistered/non-existent email address

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Form submission is blocked and an email required validation error message is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the email/username field completely empty
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify a validation error message is displayed for the email field (e.g., 'Email is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty email field only

negative_scenarios.expected_result: After logout, the session is fully invalidated and any direct attempt to access a protected URL redirects the user back to the login page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed and copy the current protected URL
Click the 'Logout' / 'Sign Out' button
Verify the user is redirected to the login page
Attempt to navigate directly to the previously copied protected URL
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page and cannot access the protected content
negative_scenarios.title: Accessing protected page directly after logout (session invalidation check)

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application handles the SQL injection attempt gracefully, login is denied, and no sensitive server information is leaked
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a SQL injection string (e.g., "' OR '1'='1") in the email/username field
Enter any value (e.g., 'password') in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT logged in or redirected to a protected page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials' or 'Invalid email format')
Verify no unhandled server error or stack trace is exposed to the user
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection in email field
